payload.title: Authority inversion risk: site-registry-locus-authority
payload.summary: Mutation commands do not yet share a common preflight that classifies cwd as authority locus, stale clone, read-only embodiment, or unknown.
evidence: visible_artifact=Site registry rows, config files, cwd, and clone path
hidden_authority=A Site mutation must resolve to the declared authority locus; other clones/shells are read embodiments unless routed.
current_guard=Site doctor, governed locus federation doctrine, plural embodiment doctrine.
payload.proposed_action: Add Site mutation authority preflight and wire it into task/inbox/publication guard paths.
